name: VSSAudit Security Event Source Registration
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g, Open Threat Research (OTR)
SIGMA Title: VSSAudit Security Event Source Registration
SIGMA Description: Detects the registration of the security event source VSSAudit. It would usually trigger when volume shadow copy operations happen.

False positives:
- Legitimate use of VSSVC. Maybe backup operations. It would usually be done by C:\Windows\System32\VSSVC.exe.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%vssaudit%' AND ("Event ID" IN('4904', '4905')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY VSSAudit Security Event Source Registration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%vssaudit%' AND ("Event ID" IN('4904', '4905')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: VSSAudit Security Event Source Registration

This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
